<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#8fd3ff"/>
  <defs>
    <pattern id="grass" x="0" y="0" width="32" height="32" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="16" height="16" fill="#5dbb3b"/>
      <rect x="16" y="0" width="16" height="16" fill="#4aa22f"/>
      <rect x="0" y="16" width="16" height="16" fill="#4fae31"/>
      <rect x="16" y="16" width="16" height="16" fill="#3f8e27"/>
    </pattern>
    <pattern id="dirt" x="0" y="0" width="32" height="32" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="16" height="16" fill="#8b5a3c"/>
      <rect x="16" y="0" width="16" height="16" fill="#7a4f36"/>
      <rect x="0" y="16" width="16" height="16" fill="#7f4e33"/>
      <rect x="16" y="16" width="16" height="16" fill="#653e2a"/>
    </pattern>
  </defs>

  <!-- soft shadow -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="440" rx="120" ry="20" fill="#000" opacity="0.15" />

  <!-- stylized Minecraft grass block (top, left, right faces with pixel patterns) -->
  <polygon points="256,120 400,196 256,272 112,196" fill="url(#grass)" stroke="#1f6a1c" stroke-width="4"/>
  <polygon points="112,196 256,272 256,416 112,340" fill="url(#dirt)" stroke="#5b3b2a" stroke-width="4"/>
  <polygon points="256,272 400,196 400,340 256,416" fill="#6f3f28" stroke="#5b3b2a" stroke-width="4"/>

  <!-- pixel-style pickaxe leaning on the block -->
  <g transform="translate(200,180) rotate(-40)">
    <!-- handle -->
    <rect x="-10" y="40" width="220" height="24" rx="4" fill="#8b5a2b"/>
    <rect x="10" y="44" width="180" height="8" fill="#6a3f1a"/>
    <!-- head -->
    <g transform="translate(190,44)">
      <rect x="0" y="-10" width="70" height="22" fill="#bfbfbf"/>
      <rect x="6" y="-6" width="58" height="12" fill="#909090"/>
      <rect x="-6" y="18" width="22" height="10" fill="#bfbfbf" transform="rotate(40 5 23)"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
